name: FIA 2026 Baseline
description: Phase 1 baseline regulation preset for exploring the 2026 rules direction without claiming full sporting or technical fidelity.

provenance.source: Phase 1 research synthesis from public 2026 Formula 1 regulation direction
provenance.notes: This preset captures only coarse Phase 1 configuration hooks and is not an official regulation transcription.

assumptionNotes.note: Active aero and larger electrical-energy contribution are represented as qualitative placeholders rather than calibrated subsystem equations.

provenance.notes: Detailed active-aero and power-unit dynamics are deferred to later phases.

notes: Not a full legal or technical specification
